What I Offer

Services Built
Around Your Data

From raw datasets to decision-ready insights — here's how I help organizations move faster and smarter.

01

Data Analysis & Insights

I analyze complex datasets using Python, SQL, Excel, and statistical methods to uncover meaningful patterns. I help clients understand what their data is really saying — and what actions to take.

✦ Clear insights that support better decision-making
02

Data Visualization & Dashboards

I design interactive dashboards using Power BI and Excel that simplify complex data into visual stories your entire team can act on — no data expertise required.

✦ Dashboards that make performance tracking simple
03

Health Data Analysis

I specialize in analyzing health-related data for NGOs and public health projects — including trends, reports, and program evaluation — to improve outcomes where they matter most.

✦ Actionable health insights that support better interventions
04

Reporting & Business Intelligence

I create structured reports and summaries that help organizations track performance, communicate results clearly, and make confident, data-driven decisions at every level.

✦ Professional reports that improve clarity and strategy

About Me

The Story
Behind the Data

Python SQL Power BI Excel Statistics Health Data Data Viz

I am a Data Scientist with a strong focus on Health Data Analytics — passionate about using data to improve health outcomes and business performance.

My journey began through structured training with the Tech4Dev Women Techsters Fellowship, where I developed core skills in data science and engineering. Since then, I have worked on real-world projects with a health-focused NGO and freelance clients in the agricultural sector.

These experiences shaped my ability to work with diverse datasets, solve problems analytically, and communicate insights in a way that actually drives action. I don't just produce reports — I help people understand what the data is saying and what to do next.

💡
"I believe the best data analysis doesn't end with a chart — it ends with a decision."

Portfolio & Work Samples

Portfolio &
Work Samples

Real projects. Real data. Real impact — across health, agriculture, and business intelligence.

📊 Training · Business Intelligence

Sales Performance Analysis Dashboard

Built a multi-page Power BI dashboard as part of the Tech4Dev Women Techsters Fellowship training, analysing sales data across the US and Germany from 2007–2011.

The dashboard tracked $243M in revenue, $74M in profit, and 169K units sold — with breakdowns by city, product division, customer, salesorg, and seasonal trends. Includes KPI cards, scatter plots, donut charts, and a geographic map visual.

Power BI DAX Business Intelligence
✦ Outcome: Demonstrated advanced Power BI skills across a 4-page interactive report
🏥 NGO · Health Data

PANSweek Medical Outreach Analysis

Analysed community health screening data from the PANSweek Medical Outreach in Rumfan Gwamna 2025. The goal was to understand disease prevalence, identify at-risk groups, and support decision-making for future interventions.

Out of 275 community members, 102 were tested. Key findings included 80 cases of ulcer, 23 confirmed H.Pylori cases, and breakdowns of Malaria, Hepatitis, and Hypertension by sex and age group.

Power BI Health Analytics Data Visualization
✦ Outcome: Provided actionable health insights to support community intervention planning
🌾 Freelance · Agriculture

Bell Pepper Sales Analysis 2024–2025

Delivered a comprehensive sales analysis for an agricultural business tracking bell pepper prices and revenue across Nigerian states — Abuja, Lagos, Jos, and Port Harcourt — over a full year.

The key business questions were: which location generates the most revenue, and which season drives the highest prices? Port Harcourt (GRA) led with ₦24M revenue, and the Wet season recorded the highest average price of ₦6,154.8.

Power BI Excel Google Sheets
✦ Outcome: Helped the business understand peak sales periods and top-performing markets
💻 Training · SQL

DVD Rental Database Analysis

Performed advanced SQL analysis on a DVD rental database using PostgreSQL, as part of the Tech4Dev Women Techsters Fellowship training programme.

Wrote complex queries including CTEs, window functions with RANK() OVER, multi-table JOINs, and chained CTEs to analyse customer spending, rental revenue by category, film performance, and inventory data.

PostgreSQL CTEs Window Functions Advanced SQL
✦ Outcome: Demonstrated ability to write production-level SQL for business data analysis
